!: This is automatically generated using scripts. Edit the files in subdirectories instead.
DOWNFALLU-BLACK_POWDER.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
DOWNFALLU-BLACK_POWDER.title: Black Powder
DOWNFALLU-BRASS_TACKS.description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] Block.
DOWNFALLU-BRASS_TACKS.flavor: The luster on these tacks never seems to fade.
DOWNFALLU-BRASS_TACKS.title: Brass Tacks
DOWNFALLU-BROKEN_TOOTH.description: Whenever you defeat an Elite encounter, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP and gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] gold.
DOWNFALLU-BROKEN_TOOTH.flavor: Appears too large to have come from a human jaw...
DOWNFALLU-BROKEN_TOOTH.title: Broken Tooth
DOWNFALLU-CHARRED_GLOVE.flavor: Parts of the glove still glow with otherworldly cinders.
DOWNFALLU-CHARRED_GLOVE.title: Charred Glove
DOWNFALLU-CLASPED_LOCKET.description: Replaces [gold]Old Locket[/gold]. First time you draw a curse each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw {Cards} cards. Upon pickup, obtain {Curses} [gold]Injuries[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-CLASPED_LOCKET.title: Clasped Locket
DOWNFALLU-DENTED_PLATE.description: While your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]1[/blue] card at the start of your turn.
DOWNFALLU-DENTED_PLATE.flavor: Several bullets are still lodged inside.
DOWNFALLU-DENTED_PLATE.title: Dented Plate
DOWNFALLU-HORSESHOE.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] less.
DOWNFALLU-HORSESHOE.flavor: Lucky charm. Somebody is gonna be missing this.
DOWNFALLU-HORSESHOE.title: Horseshoe
DOWNFALLU-OLD_LOCKET.description: At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Memento[/gold] into your hand.
DOWNFALLU-OLD_LOCKET.title: Old Locket
DOWNFALLU-PET_GHOST.description: Prevent your first lethal HP loss each combat.
DOWNFALLU-PET_GHOST.title: Pet Ghost
DOWNFALLU-RED_SCARF.description: Whenever you apply a new debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-RED_SCARF.title: Red Scarf
DOWNFALLU-RYE_STALK.description: Whenever you lose HP during enemy turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
DOWNFALLU-RYE_STALK.flavor: Still in mint condition, despite being chewed on for so long.
DOWNFALLU-RYE_STALK.title: Rye Stalk
DOWNFALLU-SHOTGLASS.description: First [blue]{Limit}[/blue] times you use a potion each combat, gain a random potion. You can only use [blue]{Limit}[/blue] potions each combat.
DOWNFALLU-SHOTGLASS.flavor: Any liquid placed inside changes into something else.
DOWNFALLU-SHOTGLASS.title: Shotglass
DOWNFALLU-SPYGLASS.description: If you end your turn [gold]Concentrated[/gold], gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
DOWNFALLU-SPYGLASS.title: Spyglass
DOWNFALLU-STRAIGHT_RAZOR.description: Whenever you remove or [gold]Transform[/gold] a card from your deck, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
DOWNFALLU-STRAIGHT_RAZOR.title: Straight Razor
DOWNFALLU-BABY_SNECKO.description: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] [gold]damage[/gold] to a random enemy and [gold]Muddle[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards that do not cost {Energy:energyIcons()}.
DOWNFALLU-BABY_SNECKO.title: Young Snecko
DOWNFALLU-BLANK_CARD.description: At the start of combat, add an [purple]Echo[/purple] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random non-[red]Curse[/red], non-[gold]Status[/gold] card from your [gold]Deck[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It is free to play this turn.
DOWNFALLU-BLANK_CARD.title: Blank Card
DOWNFALLU-CLEAN_MUD.title: Snake-Charmer's Flute
DOWNFALLU-CONFUSING_CODEX.description: Whenever you trigger [blue]{Times}[/blue] [gold]Overflow[/gold] effects, apply [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to a random enemy.
DOWNFALLU-CONFUSING_CODEX.title: Ring of the Snek
DOWNFALLU-CRYSTALLIZED_MUD.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. [gold]Muddled[/gold] cards always cost more than 0.
DOWNFALLU-CRYSTALLIZED_MUD.title: Mesmerising Pendant
DOWNFALLU-D8.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Overflow[/gold] cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Lead[/purple].
DOWNFALLU-D8.flavor: It appears weighted toward one side.
DOWNFALLU-D8.title: Mystical Octahedron
DOWNFALLU-LOADED_DIE.title: Loaded Die
DOWNFALLU-RARE_BOOSTER_PACK.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] rare [gold]Offclass[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-RARE_BOOSTER_PACK.eventDescrip: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] rare [gold]Offclass[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-RARE_BOOSTER_PACK.title: Rare Booster Box
DOWNFALLU-SLEEVED_ACE.description: At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Marked Card+[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-SLEEVED_ACE.title: Sleeved Ace
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_BOSS.description:
Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{CharacterCount}[/blue] [gold]Characters[/gold]. Obtain [blue]{UncommonCount}[/blue] [gold]Upgraded[/gold] Uncommon card rewards and [blue]{RareCount}[/blue] Rare card rewards from that character.
All combats drop an additional card reward from that character.
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_BOSS.title: Lucky Horseshoe
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_COMMON.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] uncommon [gold]Offclass[/gold] Power cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_COMMON.eventDescription: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] uncommon [gold]Offclass[/gold] Power cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_COMMON.flavor: I'm The Ironclad and this is my favorite Relic in the Spire. -Merchant Advertising Pamphlet
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_COMMON.title: Seal of Approval
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_SOUL.description:
At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Soul Roll[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].{Characters.StringValue:cond:
[gold]Gift[/gold] card pool in this run: {}|}
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_SOUL.title: Snecko Soul
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_TALON.description: At the start of your turn, reduce the cost of a random non-0-cost card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by {Energy:energyIcons()} this turn.
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_TALON.flavor: Witnessed the glory of Snecko Eye and Runic Pyramid.
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO_TALON.title: Chen's Locket
DOWNFALLU-SUPER_SNECKO_SOUL.title: Super Snecko Soul
DOWNFALLU-UNKNOWN_EGG.description:
Whenever you obtain an [gold]Offclass[/gold] card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random [gold]Offclass[/gold] cards.
DOWNFALLU-UNKNOWN_EGG.flavor: What will hatch? Pay $1000 to see.
DOWNFALLU-UNKNOWN_EGG.title: Unidentified Egg
